title: Recent Developments in Labor Law 2026 – The Rise of Class Actions in Employment Law: Recent Trends and Legal Issues
content:
## Recent Developments in Labor Law 2026 – The Rise of Class Actions in Employment Law: Recent Trends and Legal Issues
We had the opportunity to participate in the Symposium on Recent Developments in Labor Law 2026, organized in Montreal by the Quebec Bar Association. There, we presented a summary of our publication on recent trends and legal issues related to the rise of class actions in labor and employment law. The discussion highlighted our in-depth analysis of recent developments in this area, situating Quebec within the Canadian context, outlining the applicable legal framework, and presenting the main trends in case law.
The publication is available free of charge to members of the Barreau du Québec.
- André L. Baril Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
